tool_args.label: Vehicle Toll Revenue Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Unfavorable results are primarily due to lower traffic volume and lower average toll revenue per vehicle.

payload.claim_text: Unfavorable results are primarily due to lower traffic volume and lower average toll revenue per vehicle.
payload.subject: Vehicle Toll Revenue

tool_args.label: Maintenance Contracts Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Unfavorable results are primarily due to the timing of payments against the mid-year forecast allocation for E-2Pass Customer Service ($5.145 Mill), the Major Maintenance and Repair Biennial Inspection contract ($1.440 Mill), and E-2Pass basis costs ($1.732 Mill), partially offset by higher security & surveillance equipment expenses ($0.377 Mill).

payload.claim_text: Unfavorable results are primarily due to the timing of payments against the mid-year forecast allocation for E-2Pass Customer Service ($5.145 Mill), the Major Maintenance and Repair Biennial Inspection contract ($1.440 Mill), and E-2Pass basis costs ($1.732 Mill), partially offset by higher security & surveillance equipment expenses ($0.377 Mill).

tool_args.label: November Forecast vs Actual Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Lower revenue is primarily due to lower toll revenue, partially offset by higher other operating income and interest income.

tool_args.label: November Forecast vs Actual Expenses Variance Explanation
